milestones: solution.py exists and contains Python code organized into multiple logical file sections using the '# filename.py' comment format as specified
RESTful API endpoints are defined for core task management operations (create, read, update, delete tasks) with route handlers or endpoint definitions
Role-based access control is implemented with at least two distinct roles (e.g., admin, manager, member) that restrict access to features or data based on user role
Database models or schema definitions exist for tasks, user profiles, and communication logs with fields appropriate to each entity
A reporting module is present that generates at least two types of reports from: project progress, resource utilization, or performance metrics
Third-party integration interfaces are defined for at least two of: calendar applications, email services, or CRM systems
